title: ANC - 3b.-Change ANC from Adaptive to Standard and vice versa during call when Transparency is ON before call
scenario: Switch ANC between Adaptive and Standard during a call when Transparency mode was ON before the call, then verify ANC and Transparency behavior after the call ends.
steps: Precondition: ANC mode is OFF and set to Adaptive or Standard; Transparency Mode is ON and set to Environment or Speech.
Start/join a call - ANC turns ON with previous selection, Transparency becomes greyed out and OFF.
Tap Transparency toggle - popup informs it's unavailable during call.
Change ANC between Adaptive and Standard - user can switch.
On Emu/Osprey/Tern: ANC stays ON with selected value, Transparency becomes accessible (OFF, previous value preserved).
On Lark/Peregrine: ANC turns OFF with selected value, Transparency becomes accessible and ON with previous value.
Toggle ANC and Transparency modes - user can switch between them.
expected: User can change ANC between Adaptive and Standard during a call when Transparency mode was ON before the call. After leaving the call, behavior depends on the device: On Emu/Osprey/Tern, ANC stays ON with the selected value and Transparency becomes accessible (OFF, previous value preserved). On Lark/Peregrine, ANC turns OFF with the selected value and Transparency becomes accessible and ON with the previous value. User can toggle between ANC and Transparency modes.
